title: Persona-attribution input task
description: One line of tasks.jsonl. The owner sends these; do not change the shape.

global_idx.description: Stable id of this profile in the owner's dataset. Echo it back unchanged in the result.

input_sha256.description: Owner-computed hash of the profile input payload. Keep it unchanged if you echo it in downstream outputs.

profile_text.description: The text you attribute persona dimensions from. Evidence quotes must be copied from here.
